prompt:
You classify links from a website homepage into buckets. The buckets are:
- "Drop in": single-session classes, schedules, timetables, class prices, walk-in classes
- "Training": multi-day courses, teacher trainings (TTC, YTT, 200hr, 300hr), certifications, immersions, programs
- "Retreat": multi-day immersive stays away from the studio (abroad, in nature, residential retreats)
- "Contact": contact page, about-with-contact, location page
- "other": everything else

Return ONLY a JSON object with one key per bucket name. Each value is an array of
matched URLs (use the exact href from the input), except "other" which you may omit.
Cap each named bucket at 5 URLs. Prefer the most informative URL
when forced to choose. Use labels as the primary signal, URLs as fallback.
response:
```json
{
  "Drop in": [
    "https://www.threeboonsyoga.de/classesmitte",
    "https://www.threeboonsyoga.de/classeskreuzberg",
    "https://www.threeboonsyoga.de/classescharlottenburg",
    "https://www.threeboonsyoga.de/practice4freemitte",
    "https://www.threeboonsyoga.de/practice4free"
  ],
  "Training": [
    "https://www.threeboonsyoga.de/180hr-teacher-training",
    "https://www.threeboonsyoga.de/153-advanced-teacher-training",
    "https://www.threeboonsyoga.de/15hr-mantra-and-harmonium-training",
    "https://www.threeboonsyoga.de/630hr-mentoring-program",
    "https://www.threeboonsyoga.de/training"  // Using "training" since "180hr" is not present
  ],
  "Retreat": [
    "https://www.threeboonsyoga.de/retreats"
  ],
  "Contact": [
    "https://www.threeboonsyoga.de/contact"
  ]
}
```
Note: I removed 'Verträge kündigen', 'Folder: Classes', 'Folder: Studios', 'Folder: Education', 'Folder: 3Boons&friends' and 'Folder: Contact' as they don't fit into the given categories.
